{{Quote|A ''thousand'' thanks, yes, yes! Oh my, my, it was a ''good day'' for Biitu when you arrived!|[[Pitor]], to [[Rex/Legends|Rex]]|<ref name="A Small Scrappy War!">{{TCWComicCite|6.33|A Small Scrappy War!}}</ref>}}
'''Biitu''' was the [[Biituian]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] in the [[Cassandran Worlds/Legends|Cassandran Worlds]] region.

==Description==
Biitu was an [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] in the [[Cassander sector/Legends|Cassander sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="Geo">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> It was home to several [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Plant/Legends|plants]], including a [[Unidentified Biituian fruit tree|fruit tree]] that produced an orange-colored, edible [[Fruit/Legends|fruit]], and a green-stalked [[Unidentified Biituian crop plant|plant]] that produced a yellow, cylindrical crop. Both of these species were cultivated by the native [[Biituian]]s. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was also home to an orange-plumed, flight-capable [[Unidentified Biituian bird|bird]], a yellow, burrowing reptile,<ref name="Heep" /> and the timid [[Biituian fen-hare]].<ref name="Slave" /> [[Mungo Baobab]], a visitor to the planet, rode a [[rockhopper]] while [[Scout/Legends|scouting]] out on the planet's surface.<ref name="Heep" />

==History==
[[File:Pitor_Processing_Plantworks.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Biitu during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]]]
Biitu was a low-tech [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]]. During the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Traavis]] led [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone forces]] to war against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] on this planet.<ref name="O66:DAJ" /> When [[Mungo Baobab]] discovered a valuable fuel source on Biitu, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] dispatched a gigantic evil [[Droid/Legends|droid]] called the "[[Great Heep]]" to capture Mungo and take control of the planet and turn it into a wasteland. With the aid of a small boy named [[Fidge Tadrazan|Fidge]] and his pet, [[Chubb]], the [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] devised a daring scheme to free Mungo, defeat the forces of the Empire and liberate Biitu from the Great Heep.<ref name="Heep" />

From [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] to [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], the planet became part of the [[Pentastar Alignment]] until the death of [[Ardus Kaine]]. It would soon become part of the [[Imperial Remnant]].<ref name="TEA" />
